zh.Erfweiler, Mandelbachtal, Saar-Pfalz-Kre: 德國薩阿藍德薩阿普法爾-可萊斯曼德爾巴塔爾艾維利
zh.lifeSummary: Nickel Huna於1440年出生在德國薩阿藍德薩阿普法爾-可萊斯曼德爾巴塔爾艾維利。他至少有1個兒子。他在德國薩阿藍德薩阿普法爾-可萊斯曼德爾巴塔爾艾維利被列為schultheiß 。他去世於1521年在他的家鄉享年81歲。

zh-hans.Erfweiler, Mandelbachtal, Saar-Pfalz-Kre: 德国薩阿藍德薩阿普法爾-可萊斯曼德爾巴塔爾艾維利
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Nickel Huna于1440年出生在德国薩阿藍德薩阿普法爾-可萊斯曼德爾巴塔爾艾維利。他至少有1个儿子。他在德国薩阿藍德薩阿普法爾-可萊斯曼德爾巴塔爾艾維利被列为schultheiß 。他去世于1521年在他的家乡享年81岁。

nameMeanings.name: Huna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: Nickel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Dieter, Armin, Bernd, Gerhard, Hans, Helmut, Adelheid, Dietrich, Erhard, Ewald, Franz.
German and Dutch: from a pet form of Nick, a short form of the personal name Nikolaus (see Nicholas ). This surname is rare in the Netherlands.
English (northern): from the Middle English personal name Nic(h)ol(e), a vernacular form of Nic(h)olas (see Nicholas ). It was also sometimes used as a female name. See Nichol .

variants.name: Nickels
meanings: English (Devon): variant of Nickel , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.

German, Luxembourgish, and Dutch: patronymic from Nickel . This surname has died out in the Netherlands. The surname Nickels is also found in the province of Luxembourg and elsewhere in Wallonia (Belgium).

variants.name: Nicholas
meanings: form of the post-classical Greek personal name Nikolaos, derived from nikē ‘victory’ + laos ‘people’. The spelling with -ch- first occurred as early as the 12th century, and became firmly established at the time of the Reformation, although Nicolas is still occasionally found. St Nicholas was a 4th-century bishop of Myra in Lycia, about whom virtually nothing factual is known, although a vast body of legend grew up around him, and he became the patron saint of Greece and of Russia, as well as of children, sailors, merchants, and pawnbrokers. His feast day is 6 December , and among the many roles which legend has assigned to him is that of bringer of Christmas presents, in the guise of ‘Santa Claus’ (an alteration of the Dutch form of his name, Sinterklaas).

en.lifeSummary: Nickel Huna was born in 1440, in Erfweiler, Mandelbachtal, Saarpfalz-Kreis, Saarland, Germany. He had at least 1 son. His occupation is listed as schultheiß  in Erfweiler, Mandelbachtal, Saarpfalz-Kreis, Saarland, Germany. He died in 1521, in his hometown, at the age of 81.

fr.Erfweiler, Mandelbachtal, Saar-Pfalz-Kre: Erfweiler, Mandelbachtal, Saarpfalz-Kreis, La Sarre, Allemagne
fr.lifeSummary: Nickel Huna est né en 1440, à Erfweiler, Mandelbachtal, Saarpfalz-Kreis, La Sarre, Allemagne. Il a eu au moins 1 fils. Sa profession de son indiquée est schultheiß  à Erfweiler, Mandelbachtal, Saarpfalz-Kreis, La Sarre, Allemagne. Il est décédé en 1521, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 81 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Nickel Huna wurde 1440 in Erfweiler, Mandelbachtal, Saarpfalz-Kreis, Saarland, Deutschland geboren. Er hatte mindestens 1 Sohn. sein Beruf ist als schultheiß  in Erfweiler, Mandelbachtal, Saarpfalz-Kreis, Saarland, Deutschland aufgeführt. Er starb 1521 im Alter von 81 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Nickel Huna è nato il nel 1440 nel Erfweiler, Mandelbachtal, Saarpfalz-Kreis, Saarland, Germania. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio. La sua occupazione è indicata come schultheiß  nel Erfweiler, Mandelbachtal, Saarpfalz-Kreis, Saarland, Germania. Morì nel 1521, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 81 anni.

ja.Erfweiler, Mandelbachtal, Saar-Pfalz-Kre: ドイツサアルランドサアルプファルズ-クレイスマンデルバチタルエルフウエイラー
ja.lifeSummary: Nickel Hunaは1440年にドイツサアルランドサアルプファルズ-クレイスマンデルバチタルエルフウエイラーで生まれた。彼は少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。ドイツサアルランドサアルプファルズ-クレイスマンデルバチタルエルフウエイラーでの職業はschultheiß と記録されている。彼は1521年に故郷で81歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Nickel Huna(은)는 1440년 독일 사알랜드 사아르p팔즈-크레이스 먼델바ch탤 르프위러에서 태어났다. 그는 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그의 직업은 독일 사알랜드 사아르p팔즈-크레이스 먼델바ch탤 르프위러에서 schultheiß 이었다. 그는 1521년 그의 고향에서 81세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Nickel Huna nasceu em 1440, em Erfweiler, Mandelbachtal, Saarpfalz-Kreis, Saarland, Alemanha. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho. Sua profissão aparece como schultheiß  em Erfweiler, Mandelbachtal, Saarpfalz-Kreis, Saarland, Alemanha. Ele faleceu em 1521, em sua cidade natal, com 81 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Nickel Huna родился в 1440 г. в местности эрфвилир, манделбачталь, саарпфалз-крис, саарланд, Германия. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын.  Он работал по профессии schultheiß  в местности эрфвилир, манделбачталь, саарпфалз-крис, саарланд, Германия. Он умер в 1521 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 81 год.

es.lifeSummary: Nickel Huna nació en 1440, en Erfweiler, Mandelbachtal, Saarpfalz-Kreis, Saarland, Alemania. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo. Su ocupación registrada era schultheiß  en Erfweiler, Mandelbachtal, Saarpfalz-Kreis, Saarland, Alemania. Murió en 1521, en su pueblo, a la edad de 81 años.
